raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "ne effeet fuhtri eet/ ka juhs nah-
kat to Semmi usnemt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad juhs nahkat/ tad nah-
ekat juhs pee drohscheem Laudim/
nn tai Seimmei irr plattas Roh-
beschag/ jo Deews irr to juhsâs
Rohkâs dewts/ weenn Weetu /
kur ne fahds Truhkums irr no
jebkurras Leetas/ kas wirs Sem-
mes irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad aisgabje no turrenes/
no to Daniteru Raddeem/no Za-
reas un Estaoles/ feschfints ap-
brunnotti Karra-Wihri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee zehlahs us augfchu/
un apmettehs eeksh Kiriat Jea-
rina eeksh Juha/ tadeht notau-
ze tee to paschn Weetu Danna
Lehgeris lihds schodeen/raugi tas
irr ais Kiriat Jearama.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no turrenes gahje tee
us Eewraima Kalneem/ un nah-
ze us Mikkus Nammu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja tee peezi
Wihri/kas bija gahjuſchi toSem-
mi islubkoht/ un fazzija us fa-
weem Brahteem : Ar juhs fin-
nat/ ka fchinni Nainâ irr weens
Eewods un Elka-Deews/ un wee-
na iſgreesta un weena leeta Bil-
de? tad nu juhs warrat paschi
finnat/ kas jums jadarra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nogreesahs us tur-
ren/ un nahze us ta Jauneſta ta
Lewita Nammu / us Mikkus
Naimu/ un fweizinaja to meertai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee fefchtints Wihri/
kas no Danna Behrneem bija ar
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee peezi Wihri/ kas
bij gahjuſchi to Semmi islub-
koht/ nahze us turren/ un nehme
to iſgreestu Bildi/ nn to Eetwo-
du / un tohs Elka-Deewus/ un
to leetu Bildi/ un tas Preesteris
stahweja peeWahrtu Durwim/ar
teem fefchſints apbrunnoteem
Wihreem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu fchee eeksh Mik-
kus Namuna nahze/ un nehme to
iſgreestu Bildi / to Eewodu / un
to Elka-Deewu/ un to leetu Bil-
di/ tad fazztja tas Preesteris us
teem:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ko juhs darrat? un tee
fazztja us winxn : Klaftu/ turr
Mutti/ un etj ar mums lihdſi /
un eſt mums par Tehwu un par
Preesteri/irr tastew labbaki wee-
na weeniga Mihra Naimnâ par
Preesteri buht/ ne ka starp wee-
nu Zilti un weenu Raddu eeksh
Israeka?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad bija tas tam Preeste-
ram paprahtam/ un winſch neh-
me to Eewedu / un tohs Elka-
Deewus/ un to iſgreestu Bildi/
un gahje lihdſi to LanschuWiddû.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta atgreesahs winxi/ un
nogahje/ un fuhtija tohs Behrni-
bus/un to Gannama-Pulku/ un
fawas dahrgas Leetas papreek-
schu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tee nu bija tahti no
Mikkus Namuna nahnuſchi/ tad
tappe tee Wihri fasauſti/ kas
Namnòs pee Mikkus Namma
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
